data.message: Detected possible user input going into a `path.join` or `path.resolve` function. This could possibly lead to a path traversal vulnerability,  where the attacker can access arbitrary files stored in the file system. Instead, be sure to sanitize or validate user input first.

`row[percentCol].replace` method will only replace the first occurrence when used with a string argument ('%'). If this method is used for escaping of dangerous data then there is a possibility for a bypass. Try to use sanitization library instead or use a Regex with a global flag.

data.message: Detected user input used to manually construct a SQL string. This is usually bad practice because manual construction could accidentally result in a SQL injection. An attacker could use a SQL injection to steal or modify contents of the database. Instead, use a parameterized query which is available by default in most database engines. Alternatively, consider using an object-relational mapper (ORM) such as Sequelize which will protect your queries.

Detected possible user input going into a `path.join` or `path.resolve` function. This could possibly lead to a path traversal vulnerability,  where the attacker can access arbitrary files stored in the file system. Instead, be sure to sanitize or validate user input first.

`row[percentCol].replace` method will only replace the first occurrence when used with a string argument ('%'). If this method is used for escaping of dangerous data then there is a possibility for a bypass. Try to use sanitization library instead or use a Regex with a global flag.

location.lines:
const htmlContent = ` Project Status Report - ${project.name}

PROJECT STATUS REPORT

${reportDate}

${project.name}

Executive Summary

${executiveSummary || project.description || 'No executive summary provided.'}

Project Schedule

Complete (${Math.round((completed / total) * 100)}%)
In Progress (${Math.round((inProgress / total) * 100)}%)
Not Started (${Math.round((notStarted / total) * 100)}%)

Financials

Budget ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}
Actual ${formatCurrency(actual)}
Forecast ${formatCurrency(forecast)}
Variance ${formatCurrency(variance)}

Project Health

✓
Overall
✓
Schedule
✓
Budget
!
Risk

Key Risks & Issues

${allOpenRisks.length}
Open Risks
${allOpenIssues.length}
Open Issues

High/Critical: ${riskHigh + issueCritical}

${openRisks.length === 0 && openIssues.length === 0 ? '

No open risks or issues

' : [...openRisks.map(r => ({...r, itemType: 'RISK', itemPriority: r.impact})), ...openIssues.map(i => ({...i, itemType: 'ISSUE', itemPriority: i.priority}))].slice(0, 5).map(item => `
${item.itemType} ${item.title || ''} ${item.itemPriority || 'Medium'}
`).join('') }

Major Milestones

${majorMilestones.length === 0 ? '

No milestones defined

' : ` ${majorMilestones.map(ms => { const status = getMilestoneStatus(ms); return ` `; }).join('')}
${ms.title} ${formatDate(ms.dueDate)} ${status.text}
` }

Project Timeline

${formatDate(project.startDate)} → ${formatDate(project.endDate)}

${project.completionPercentage || 0}% Complete

${project.status} ${project.priority}
${changeRequests.length > 0 ? `

Change Requests (${changeRequests.length})

${changeRequests.slice(0, 5).map(cr => { const statusColor = cr.status === 'approved' ? '#16a34a' : cr.status === 'rejected' ? '#dc2626' : '#6b7280'; return ` `; }).join('')}
${cr.title || 'Untitled'} ${(cr.type || 'scope').replace('_', ' ')} ${(cr.status || 'pending').replace('_', ' ')}
${changeRequests.length > 5 ? `

+ ${changeRequests.length - 5} more change requests

` : ''}
` : ''} ${documents.length > 0 ? `

Project Documents (${documents.length})

${documents.slice(0, 5).map(doc => ` `).join('')}
${doc.title || 'Untitled'} ${(doc.category || 'general').replace('_', ' ')} v${doc.version || '1.0'}
${documents.length > 5 ? `

+ ${documents.length - 5} more documents

` : ''}
` : ''}
${tasks.length}
Total Tasks
${Math.round((completed / total) * 100)}%
Complete
${milestones.filter(m => !m.deletedAt).length}
Milestones
${allOpenRisks.length + allOpenIssues.length}
Open Items

Generated by FridayReport.AI on ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })} at ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}

FridayReport.AI

Reset Your Password

You requested a password reset for your FridayReport.AI account.

Click the button below to set a new password:

Reset Password

This link will expire in 1 hour.

If you didn't request this password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
${resetUrl}

The FridayReport.AI Team
